Id1.text: Rock musician Anders Osborne has previously been signed to the record labels Alligator Records and Okeh Records.

Id2.text: Once signed with the record label Alligator Records, Anders Osborne, is signed to the record label Okeh Records and is an exponent of Rock music.

Id3.text: An exponent of Rock music, Anders Osborne's record labels are Okeh Records and Alligator Records.
